# Slotplate scenario catalog

Every Playwright behavior scenario in this repo, listed by file. Run them all with `pnpm test:e2e`. Open the [testing guide](../../docs/TESTING.md) for the full bridge API.

Generated: 2026-05-01T15:22:38.243Z

**11** spec files · **34** scenarios

---

## [`a11y.spec.ts`](./a11y.spec.ts)

> Accessibility scenarios — the canvas isn't free.

### a11y

- every required Pixi label exists
- every interactive Pixi node has a non-empty bounding box
- HUD controls fit inside the canvas (no off-screen clipping)

## [`autospin.spec.ts`](./autospin.spec.ts)

> Autospin scenarios — counter ticks down, FSM keeps cycling, stop works.

### autospin

- three rounds of autospin debit three bets and end at idle
- stopAutospin halts the cycle after the current round

## [`full-boot.spec.ts`](./full-boot.spec.ts)

> Full-boot scenario — proves a test can walk the same path a real player does:

### full boot flow

- assets → intro screen → tap to start → idle → spin
- test id from URL is exposed to the bridge
- pause + screenshot mid-round

## [`input.spec.ts`](./input.spec.ts)

> Input scenarios — clicking, double-click guards.

### input

- spin button click debits the bet and ends in idle
- rapid double-click does not double-spend (known bug)
- bet stepper plus/minus updates the bet store
- autoplay button toggles autospin

## [`locale.spec.ts`](./locale.spec.ts)

> Locale matrix — re-runs a baseline scenario in every supported language.

### locale matrix

- spin works in ${lang}
- menu opens in ${lang}

## [`network-failure.spec.ts`](./network-failure.spec.ts)

> Network failure scenarios — server errors, dropped connection, recovery.

### network failure

- server error rejects the spin and the FSM does not advance
- connection drop mid-spin leaves the spin pending, recovery resolves it
- history records both outcomes when a request fails then succeeds

## [`perf.spec.ts`](./perf.spec.ts)

> Performance scenarios — pin the FSM round duration in instant mode.

### performance

- one round completes in well under 100ms
- 50 sequential rounds complete in under 5 seconds (cross-process)

### pixi coverage

- every required label exists on the stage tree
- pixi bounds return non-zero box for visible HUD controls
- clickPixi(
- test id from URL is exposed on the bridge
- pauseTicker freezes animation; resumeTicker unfreezes

## [`recorder.spec.ts`](./recorder.spec.ts)

> Recorder scenario — proves QA can capture an interactive session and

### recorder

- captures every action and formats as a spec file
- hello-recorded
- expect(slot) custom matchers narrate state
- audio cues land in the audio log
- snapshotCanvas returns a PNG data URL

## [`replay.spec.ts`](./replay.spec.ts)

> Replay scenarios — feed real or recorded SpinResponse logs through the

### replay

- plays a recorded SpinResponse log end-to-end
- replay survives a network hiccup mid-tape

## [`spin-flow.spec.ts`](./spin-flow.spec.ts)

> Spin flow scenarios — happy path, big win, no-win.

### spin flow

- happy path — losing spin debits the bet and ends in idle
- big win — server-resolved win credits the wallet
- three spins compose: 100 → 99 → 99 + 5 → 103 + 0 = 103 with $1 bet
